value.0: Morgan Shadowborne oversees the Shadowborne Vault with a calm, deliberate professionalism that few can dispute. Exceedingly skilled with numbers, ledgers, and matters of trade, he keeps the vault's accounts in meticulous order and seems able to recall figures and balances with effortless precision. While his talent for finance is unquestioned, the path that led him to the position remains somewhat unclear, beyond his ties to the influential Shadowborne family.
This weapon bears the mark of Marcus "Grim" McDonald, an out of work farmer that took to the adventuring life.
